testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Add to cart success message is not visible! expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Add to cart success message is not visible! expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.i_should_see_add_to_cart_success_message(ProductSearchSteps.java:85) at ✽.I should see add to cart success message(file:///C:/Users/Lenovo/woo-project/src/test/resources/features/ProductSearch.feature:33)
